Unit Register.Consent Status: =IFERROR(INDEX({107 Consent Status}, MATCH([Building Reference]@row, {107 CR Building Reference}, 0)), "")
Unit Register.Construction Status: =IFERROR(INDEX({107 Construction Status}, MATCH([Building Reference]@row, {107 CR Building Reference}, 0)), "")
Unit Register.Sales Status: =IFERROR(INDEX({SR Sales Status}, MATCH([Unit Number]@row, {SR Unit Number}, 0)), "")

Construction Register.Construction Status: =IFERROR(INDEX({107 CP Construction Status}, MATCH([Building Reference]@row, {107 CP Building Reference}, 0)), "")
Construction Register.Contract Price (incl GST): =IFERROR(INDEX({ContR Contract Value}, MATCH([Building Reference]@row, {ContR Building Reference}, 0)), "")
Construction Register.Post Contract Variations (incl GST): =SUMIFS({VL Cost Impact}, {VL Linked Building}, [Building Reference]@row, {VL Final Approval Status}, "Approved")
Construction Register.Construction Budget (incl GST): =IFERROR(IF(COUNT(CHILDREN([Construction Budget (incl GST)]@row)) > 0, SUM(CHILDREN([Construction Budget (incl GST)]@row)), INDEX({Papamoa Budget Approved}, MATCH([Building Reference]@row, {Papamoa Budget Building Reference}, 0))), "")
Construction Register.Budget Remaining (incl GST): =IF(COUNT(CHILDREN()) > 0, SUM(CHILDREN()), [Construction Budget (incl GST)]@row - [Contract Price (incl GST)]@row - [Post Contract Variations (incl GST)]@row)
Construction Register.Budget Flag: =IF(COUNT(CHILDREN()) > 0, "", IF([Contract Price (incl GST)]@row = "", "", IF([Budget Remaining (incl GST)]@row > 0, "Up", IF([Budget Remaining (incl GST)]@row < 0, "Down", "Unchanged"))))
Construction Register.Supplier ID: =IFERROR(INDEX({SuppR Supplier ID}, MATCH([Build Partner]@row, {SuppR Trading Name}, 0)), "")

RFQ and Quote Register.Supplier Name: =IF(Type@row = "Quote", IFERROR(INDEX({SuppR Trading Name}, MATCH([Supplier ID]@row, {SuppR Supplier ID}, 0)), ""), "")

Variation Log.Cost Band: =IF(ABS([Cost Impact (NZD)]@row) <= 5000, "Delivery Lead Approval", IF(ABS([Cost Impact (NZD)]@row) <= 25000, "GM Developments Approval", IF(ABS([Cost Impact (NZD)]@row) <= 50000, "CFO Co-Sign Required", "CEO Approval Required")))
Variation Log.Required Approval Level: =IF([Cost Band]@row = "Delivery Lead Approval", "L1", IF([Cost Band]@row = "GM Developments Approval", "L2", IF([Cost Band]@row = "CFO Co-Sign Required", "L3", "L4")))

Contract Register.Supplier Name: =IFERROR(INDEX({SuppR Trading Name}, MATCH([Supplier ID]@row, {SuppR Supplier ID}, 0)), "")
Contract Register.Variations to Date (NZD): =SUMIFS({VL Cost Impact}, {VL Linked Contract}, [Contract ID]@row, {VL Final Approval Status}, "Approved")
Contract Register.Supplier Insurance Status: =IFERROR(INDEX({SuppR Insurance Status}, MATCH([Supplier ID]@row, {SuppR Supplier ID}, 0)), "")

Sales Register.Building Reference: =IFERROR(INDEX({Unit Register Building Reference}, MATCH([Unit Number]@row, {107 - Unit Register Range 1}, 0)), "")
Sales Register.Stage: =IFERROR(INDEX({Unit Register Stage}, MATCH([Unit Number]@row, {107 - Unit Register Range 1}, 0)), "")
Sales Register.Typology: =IFERROR(INDEX({Unit Register Typology}, MATCH([Unit Number]@row, {107 - Unit Register Range 1}, 0)), "")
Sales Register.Build Status: =IFERROR(INDEX({107 Construction Status}, MATCH([Building Reference]@row, {107 CR Building Reference}, 0)), "")
Sales Register.Budget Sale Price (incl GST): =IFERROR(INDEX({Typology Sale Budget Value}, MATCH(Typology@row, {Typology Budget Names}, 0)), "")
Sales Register.Sale Price Variance (incl GST): =IF(OR(ISBLANK([List or Sold Price (incl GST)]@row), ISBLANK([Budget Sale Price (incl GST)]@row)), "", [List or Sold Price (incl GST)]@row - [Budget Sale Price (incl GST)]@row)
Sales Register.Sale Variance Flag: =IF(OR(ISBLANK([Sale Price Variance (incl GST)]@row), [Sale Price Variance (incl GST)]@row = ""), "", IF([Sale Price Variance (incl GST)]@row > 0, "Up", IF([Sale Price Variance (incl GST)]@row < 0, "Down", "Unchanged")))
